zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Meynell IV於1157年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾笛卡爾 達爾比時，他的父親Robert de Meinell26歲，母親Gertrude Asceline Fossard19歲。他於1186年與Agnes Langley在英國德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1198年之後在英國英格蘭德比夏爾明日香 密爾。

nameMeanings.name: Meynell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 Norman, English: locative name from one of the French places named Mesnil, from Old French mesnil (Latin * mansionile, a diminutive of mansio ‘abode, habitation’), used of the country domain where a noble lived with his family and retainers. As a surname it may also be used of a member of the household, retainer. Some of the bearers listed below may belong to (2).
2 English: relationship name from the Continental Germanic female personal name Maginhild.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Meynell IV was born in 1157, in Old Dalby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Meinell, was 26 and his mother, Gertrude Asceline Fossard, was 19. He married Agnes Langley in 1186, in Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died after 1198, in Langley Mill, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Agnes Langley en 1186, à Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé après 1198, à Langley Mill, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Meynell IVが1157年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアオルド ダルビーで生まれた時，父Robert de Meinellは26歳，母Gertrude Asceline Fossardは19歳であった。1186年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアでAgnes Langleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1198年以後にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアラングリー ミルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Meynell IV(이)가 1157년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 드 다비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Meinell(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Gertrude Asceline Fossard(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1186년 영국 더비실르에서 Agnes Langley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1198년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 랭글리 미에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Meynell IV родился в 1157 г. в местности олд далби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Meinell было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrude Asceline Fossard, 19. Он умер после 1198 г. в местности лангли милл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.
